headline: Charles Schwab Targets Future Clients With New Teen Investor Accounts
summary: Charles Schwab (NYSE:SCHW) has launched a Teen Investor account for customers aged 13 to 17. The account is set up as a joint brokerage with a parent or guardian, providing oversight and control. Teens gain access to a range of investment products along with tailored financial education resources. The program includes incentives tied to completing educational modules on responsible investing. For a large retail brokerage like Charles Schwab, the Teen Investor account extends its reach...
